name: Sumpter Wooded lot - Two RV Pads - All Utilities - Walk to Town or Trails

It is an improved lot with two full hookup graveled RV/trailer pads (electricity including two 30 and 50 amp plugs along with 110, city water, and septic). There is also enough space for a third RV/Trailer to park on the east side as well. This nearly quarter acre parcel sits right at the corner of Granite and Ibex with direct access to hundreds of miles of back country trails for your off-road expeditions (ATV, snowmobile, or any other OHV). From this lot you are also in walking distance of all of the nature and trails the area has to offer.

name: Southern Arizona 1 Acre Corner Building Lot Near Welton - Yuma County
description: Great corner building lot located a few miles east of Welton in Southern Arizona. This property is perfect for the snowbird looking to stay warm in the winter. Build yourself a place to call your own. Zoned R-1-40, this parcel allows for one single family dwelling per 40,000 square feet of lot size. This means that there will not be residences on top of one another. This zoning also allows for raising of small farm animals for domestic use. Large animals such as horses are limited to one animal per 10,000 square feet. We did see a few RV's out here when we visited, and it sounds like enforcement of RV use is by neighbor complaint, so a good chance RV use would not be an issue. You can also apply for a variance or conditional use permit for mobile and RV use.

description: Now available, this 1.41 acre off-grid corner lot located 9 miles NW of Dateland, Arizona. This property is perfect for the snowbird looking to stay warm in the winter. Build yourself a place to call your own. Zoned R-1-40, these parcels allow for one single family dwelling per 40,000 square feet of lot size. This means that there will not be residences on top of one another. This zoning also allows for raising of small farm animals for domestic use. Large animals such as horses are limited to one animal per 10,000 square feet. We did see a few RV's out here when we visited, and it sounds like enforcement of RV use is by neighbor complaint, so a good chance RV use would not be an issue. You can also apply for a variance or conditional use permit for mobile and RV use.
